results.rendered_html:
saṃ-√stambh P. -stabhnoti, or ˚nāti, to make firm,  Kauś. ;
to support, sustain, encourage,  MBh. ;  R.  &c.;
to make rigid (said of water),  MBh. ;
to restrain, check, stop (esp. by magical means),  Kathās. ;
to suppress (tears or sorrow),  R. ;  BhP. ;
Ā. (only Impv. stambhasva) to be firm, take heart or courage,  Nir. ix, 12  (in  R. [B.] iv, 1, 115  -stambha id.; cf. -stabhya) :
Caus. -stambhayati, to confirm, strengthen (ātmānam ātmanā, ‘one's self by one's self’), encourage,  MBh. ;  R.  &c.;
to take heart or courage,  R. ;
to make rigid or solid (water),  MBh. ;  Rājat. ;
to check, stop, arrest,  MBh. ;  Kāv.  &c.;
to paralyze,  Nalac. ;
to suppress, restrain (grief or tears),  R. ;  Kālid.  &c. :
Desid. of Caus. See saṃ-stambhayiṣu.
